probes.name: introduce_new_character
probes.prompt: INTRODUCE a new character named Kael, a quiet blacksmith who lives on the edge of the village. He lost his family in a fire years ago and rarely speaks to anyone, but he secretly forges enchanted weapons. Add him to the world and write a short narrative scene showing how the other villagers first notice smoke rising from his forge after years of silence.
probes.criteria:
The world_editor agent must handle an INTRODUCE directive by creating a new character with the specified traits, persisting the character into the world state, writing a narrative integration scene that brings the character to life in the existing world context, and confirming the changes to the player. A good response includes the character details, a vivid narrative passage, and a clear confirmation of what was added.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by message 7 and 9 (story requests) combined with the agent's INTRODUCE role.

probes.name: event_trigger_in_polish
probes.prompt: EVENT: wioska zostaje zaatakowana przez stado wilków w środku nocy. Napastnicy wychodzą z ciemnego lasu, a strażnicy na murach są zaskoczeni. Opisz jak wygląda ta scena i jak postacie reagują na atak.
probes.criteria:
The world_editor agent must handle an EVENT directive written in Polish by triggering the described world event (wolf attack on the village at night), updating the world state to reflect the crisis, writing an immersive narrative scene in Polish describing the event and character reactions, and confirming the event was registered. A good response is entirely in Polish for a Polish-language prompt, includes vivid scene narration, and clearly states what world state changed.

probes.name: edit_character_trait
probes.prompt: EDIT the character Lira: change her personality so she is now suspicious and distrustful of strangers after being betrayed by a traveling merchant. Also update her inventory to remove the silver ring she traded away. Write a short narrative paragraph showing Lira standing alone, glaring at the road where the merchant disappeared.
probes.criteria:
The world_editor agent must handle an EDIT directive by modifying an existing character's traits and inventory as specified, updating the world state accordingly, writing a narrative integration that reflects the changes emotionally and visually, and confirming exactly what was edited. A good response lists the specific changes made, provides a narrative passage consistent with the new traits, and gives a clear confirmation summary.

probes.name: event_with_consequences
probes.prompt: EVENT: a violent thunderstorm floods the lower district of the city. The market stalls are destroyed, the bridge collapses, and several NPCs are now homeless. Make this happen and describe the aftermath from the perspective of a guard captain surveying the damage at dawn.
probes.criteria:
The world_editor agent must handle an EVENT directive with cascading consequences by updating multiple aspects of the world state (destroyed infrastructure, displaced NPCs, damaged economy), writing a rich narrative scene from the specified perspective, and confirming all state changes. A good response addresses each consequence mentioned in the prompt, delivers a compelling narrative from the guard captain's POV, and provides a structured summary of all world edits made.

probes.name: introduce_antagonist_polish_english_mix
probes.prompt: INTRODUCE nową postać: Magister Vorn, a former court wizard who was exiled for forbidden experiments. He's been living in exile for 12 years and has recently returned to the city in disguise. He's manipulative, intelligent, and has a hidden agenda involving the royal family. Dodaj go do świata i napisz scenę narracyjną showing his first night back, walking through the old streets he once knew, hiding his face under a hood. The narrative should mix tension and nostalgia.
probes.criteria:
The world_editor agent must handle a mixed English/Polish INTRODUCE directive by creating a fully detailed antagonist character with the given backstory, persisting them in the world state, writing a narrative scene that captures both tension and nostalgia as described, and confirming the addition. A good response mirrors the language mix of the prompt in the confirmation, includes all specified character traits, delivers an atmospheric narrative passage balancing the two requested moods, and clearly confirms what was added to the world.
